title: Packet 093 Authority Publication And Host Mirror Resync Gate
objective: Publish the Packet 093 adjacent authority and operator drift normalization tranche through the parent-root boundary and restore `/home/olares/code/apex` to clean parity so the corrected Olares guidance becomes durable on the authoritative host mirror.
dependency_note: Packet 093 tightened the remaining adjacent authority and operator docs locally and validated the directly edited surfaces. This gate is required before the normalized wording can be treated as durably complete on the host mirror.
forbidden_scope: AI-services expansion beyond the admitted trio
next_packet_candidate: Return the Olares lane to hold unless a new adjacent drift or concrete operator insufficiency appears.
sql_permission_note: This publication gate authorizes no database writes, no source/test runtime mutation, no package or lockfile mutation, no installs, no runtime or service mutation, no AI-services expansion beyond the admitted trio, no remote rewrite, no rollback or force/reset/clean, and no old-clone mutation.
closure_note: Executed 2026-05-06. Packet 094 published the Packet 093 adjacent authority/operator drift normalization tranche in commit `9d6a583e15fda4e72066addb0f1744c121d2ccd7` with message `Normalize Olares adjacent authority drift`, pushed `origin/clean-main`, restored `/home/olares/code/apex` to clean parity at the published commit, and preserved `/home/olares/src/apex-power-ops-platform` as observe-only at `2836a2622309b4e146ca24f23b5bf87312c0c857` with status count `30`.
next_action: Return the Olares lane to hold unless a new adjacent authority, operator, or visual mismatch appears; do not reopen broader AI-service or MCP admission by implication.
